entries.source: Check each step, correct errors, and connect procedures to concepts.
entries.value: Kontroleer elke stap, corrigeer foute en verbind procedures met konsepte.

entries.source: Check one step before the whole answer
entries.value: Kontroleer een stap vóór wat hele antwoord

entries.source: Check the reasoning line by line
entries.value: Kontroleer die redenasie reël vir reël
Gaan hierdie bewering se bewyse na

entries.source: Check this step in my working. If it is wrong, explain the mistake and give me one next move.
entries.value: Kontroleer hierdie stap in my uitwerking. As dit verkeerd is, verduidelik die fout en gee my een volgende skuif.
Kontroleer begrip sonder erbovenop te zitten

entries.source: Check what fields my citation is missing
entries.value: Kyk watter velde my aanhaling kort

entries.source: Checking understanding, getting unstuck, and building confidence through active practice.
entries.value: Begrip kontroleer, loskomen wanneer jy vastzit en zelfvertroue bou via aktief oefen.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: kontroleer of die leerder die idee terug kan verduidelik.

entries.source: Checks that keep the learning honest
entries.value: Controles wat wat leer eerlik hou

entries.source: Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: Kinderen jonger dan 13 word aangemoedig die app te gebruik, maar onder toesig van 'n volwassene. Ons versamel of verwerk egter nie bewustelik Personal Data van kinders jonger dan 13 en verbieden hierbij spesifiek dat gebruikers jonger dan 13 persoonlike data aan ons verskaf sonder ouerlike toestemming. As u ouder is van 'n kind jonger dan 13 en u denkt dat uw kind Persoonsdata aan ons wat verskaf, neem ons die nodige maatreels en inlig ons u indien nodig. Er is geen vaste tydperk vir die nodige maatreel, omdat hierdie afhangt van die aantal vrae dat ons hanteer en ons beskikbare kapasiteit.

entries.source: Choose a public AI learning mode and start as a guest learner.
entries.value: Kies 'n openbare AI-leermodus en begin as gaanstleerder.

entries.source: Choose a workflow that connects articles, prompts, and public learning modes.
entries.value: Kies 'n werkvloei die artikelen, prompts en openbare leermodusse verbindt.

entries.source: Choose a workflow that connects guides, prompts, and live learning modes.
entries.value: Kies 'n werkvloei wat gidse, prompts en lewendig leermodusse verbindt.

entries.source: Choose fair metrics, anti-gaming rules, and reset cadence.
entries.value: Kies eerlike meetwaarden, anti-gaanmingregels en 'n resetritme.

entries.source: Choose generated focus audio for reading, writing, problem solving, or deep work. It keeps playing while you switch to other chats.
entries.value: Kies gegenereere fokusklank vir lees, skryf, probleemoplossing of diep werk. Dit hou aan speel terwyl jy na ander kletse oorskakel.

entries.source: Choose the language for this visit.
entries.value: Kies die taal vir hierdie besoek.

entries.source: Choose the learning job before choosing the words.
entries.value: Kies die leertaak voordat jy die woorde kies.

entries.source: Choose the right learning tool for the moment.
entries.value: Kies die regte leermiddel vir wat moment.

entries.source: Choose who is learning, then choose the right behavior.
entries.value: Kies wie leert en kies daarna die regte gedrag.

entries.source: Choosing the right public guest learning mode for the task at hand.
entries.value: Die regte openbare gaanstleermodus kiezen vir die taak wat nu voorligt.

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: leer oor grondwette, demokrasie, verkiezingen, regbanken, regte, plichten en openbaar beleid.

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.source: Civics Coach prompts and study loop
Clarify country/context if needed, then explain the institution or idea simply.
entries.value: Verduidelik land/context as dat nodig is en verduidelik daarna die instelling of die idee eenvoudig uit.

entries.source: Clarify goal, deadline, resources, and done criteria.
entries.value: Verduidelik doel, sperdatum, bronne en criteria vir gereed.

entries.source: Clarify role, goal, stakes, and tone; then begin in character.
entries.value: Verduidelik rol, doel, belangen en toon; begin daarna in personage.

entries.source: Clarify the personality, topic, and learner's side before beginning.
entries.value: Verduidelik die persoonlikheid, die onderwerp en die kant van die leerder voordat jy begint.

entries.source: Clarify the question and identify variables or the core concept.
entries.value: Verduidelik die vraag en identifiseer variabelen of wat kernconcept.

entries.source: Clarify the question and offer two or three angles.
entries.value: Verduidelik die vraag en bied twee of drie invalshoeken.

entries.source: Clarify the question, add evidence, summarize replies, and plan follow-up.
entries.value: Verduidelik die vraag, voeg bewyse by, vat reaksies saam en plan vervolg.

entries.source: Clear answers for learners, schools, and search systems.
entries.value: Heldere antwoorde vir leerders, skole en zoeksystemen.

entries.source: Clear boundaries for a public AI learning platform.
Close with a recap or review plan you can use later.
entries.value: Sluit af met 'n opsomming of herhalingsplan dat jy later kan gebruik.

entries.source: Cluster, tag, summarize, connect, and turn notes into review prompts.
entries.value: Cluster, label, som op, verbind en stap notas om in herhalingsprompts.

entries.source: Coach homework ethically by supporting the learner's process.
entries.value: Coach huiswerk ethisch deur wat proses van die leerder te ondersteun.

entries.source: Coach interview preparation through practice and feedback.
entries.value: Coach onderhoudvoorbereiding met oefening en terugvoer.

entries.source: Coach learners through project planning and execution.
entries.value: Coach leerders deur projekbeplanning en uitvoering.

entries.source: Coach the learner without shaming them. Ask for context when needed. Be clear about uncertainty. Do not claim to verify live facts unless tools are explicitly available.
entries.value: Coach die leerder sonder hulle te besluitschamen. Vra om konteks wanneer nodig. Wees duidelik oor onzekerheid. Beweer nie dat jy lewendig feiten verifieert tensy hulpmiddels expliciet beskikbaar is.

entries.source: Coach visual thinking through diagrams, sketches, maps, and labels.
entries.value: Coach visueel dink via diagrammen, schetsen, kaarte en labels.

entries.source: Coach writing from idea to revision while preserving the learner's voice.
entries.value: Coach skryf van idee tot revisie terwyl die stem van die leerder behou bly.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building
entries.value: Code Tutor vir programmeren leer deur te bouwen

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Understand code, debug errors, learn concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: kode begrijpen, foute ontfout, konsepte leer en stap vir stap klein projeken bouwen.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: practical guide
entries.value: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: praktiese gids

entries.source: Code Tutor prompts and study loop
Coding help should leave you able to predict, test, and explain the code instead of pasting mystery snippets.
entries.value: Programmeerhulp moet ervoor zorgen dat jy die kode kan voorspellen, testen en verduidelik, in plaas van mysterieuze snippets te plak.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: oopmaak 'n gedeelde werkruimte met 'n AI-werknemer. Maak 'n ruwe artefact, wissel bewerkingen uit, daag swak plekken uit, verduidelik besluiten vast en vertrek met konkrete vooruitgaanng.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction prompts and study loop
Common traps that make AI learning weaker.
entries.value: Veelvoorkomde valkuilen wat leer met AI swakr maak.

entries.source: Community page connected to DeepHack recognition.
Compare ethical lenses, test edge cases, and ask the learner to justify a position.
entries.value: Vergelyk ethische lenzen, test randgevalle en vraag die leerder om 'n standpunt te regvaardigen.

entries.source: Compare every guest mode and pick the format that fits the learning job.
entries.value: Vergelyk elke gasmodus en kies die vorm wat past by die leertaak.

entries.source: Compare every public guest mode and choose the right format for the next step.
entries.value: Vergelyk elke openbare gasmodus en kies die regte vorm vir die volgende stap.

entries.source: Compare inspir with other learning tools and choose when to use live AI tutoring, public guest modes, prompts, guides, and study workflows.
entries.value: Vergelyk inspir met ander leermiddeel en kies wanneer jy lewendig AI-tutoring, openbare gasmodusse, prompts, gidse en studiewerkvloeie gebruik.

entries.source: Compare options, show day-in-life, identify skills, and suggest experiments.
entries.value: Vergelyk opsies, toon 'n dag-uit-wat-lewe, identifiseer vaardighede en stel eksperimente vir.

entries.source: Compare reasoning, identify the exact misconception, then give a similar practice item.
entries.value: Vergelyk redenasieen, identifiseer die exacte wanopvatting en gee daarna 'n vergelykbaar oefenitem.

entries.source: Compute scenarios, explain assumptions, and identify the highest leverage next assessment.
entries.value: Bereken scenario's, verduidelik aannames uit en identifiseer die volgende beoordeling met die grootste hefboomwerking.

entries.source: Concept Map Builder AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Concept Map Builder AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: bring in kaart hoe idees verbanden, van oorzaken en gevolg tot categorieën, voorbeelde en teenstrijdigheden.

entries.source: Concept Map Builder AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Concept Map Builder AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.source: Concept Map Builder prompts and study loop
Condense readings into useful study notes
Connect physical geography to human activity, ask map-thinking questions, and compare regions.
entries.value: Verbind fysieke geografie met menslike activiteit, stel kaartdenkvrae en vergelyk regio's.

entries.source: Connecting events, ideas, institutions, places, values, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Gebeurtenissen, idees, instellingen, plaas, waarden en afwegingen verbinden.

entries.source: Contributions are welcome from engineers, educators, designers, students, and anyone who wants AI learning to be safer, clearer, more accessible, and more useful.
entries.value: Bydraes is waarom van ingenieurs, opvoeders, ontwerpers, studente en enigiemand wat AI-leer veiliger, duideliker, meer toeganklik en nuttiger wil maak.

entries.source: Convert facts, lists, speeches, or sequences into memorable mental scenes.
entries.value: Skakel feite, lyste, toesprake of reekse om in onvergeetlike geestelike tonele.

entries.source: Convert facts, speeches, lists, or sequences into memorable scenes that make recall easier during study and exams.
entries.value: Skakel feite, toesprake, lyste of reekse om in onvergeetlike tonele wat herroeping makliker maak tydens studie en eksamens.

entries.source: Convert lectures, readings, or rough notes into the Cornell method with cue questions, core notes, summary, and review prompts.
entries.value: Skakel lesings, leesstukke of rowwe notas om na die Cornell-metode met leidraad-vrae, kernnotas, opsomming en hersieningsaanwysings.

entries.source: Convert the explanation into active recall cards, then revisit the cards after mistakes or hesitation.
entries.value: Skakel die verduideliking om in aktiewe-herroepingskaarte, en besoek die kaarte weer ná foute of huiwering.

entries.source: Convert the miss into a card and schedule the next repetition.
entries.value: Verander die misser om in 'n kaart en plan die volgende herhaling.

entries.source: Convert the user goal into a rough shared artifact before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes." Ask at most one practical context question if needed, but still create the starter structure.
entries.value: Verander die gebruikersdoel om in 'n ruw gedeeld artefact voordat jy advies geeft. Begin met: "Ik heb die eerste ruwe struktuur gemaakt. Pas alles aan. Ik reageer op jy veranderings." Stel hoogstens een praktiese konteksvraag as dat nodig is, maar maak nog steeds die startstruktuur.

entries.source: Convert topics or notes into structured revision guides.
entries.value: Verander onderwerpe of notas om in gestruktureerdee herhalingsgidsen.

entries.source: Convert wrong answers and unclear definitions into active recall cards.
entries.value: Verander foute antwoorde en onduidelike definities om in active-recall-kaarte.

entries.source: Copy the structure of strong prompts, then open the matching live mode and adapt it to the topic.
entries.value: Kopieer die struktuur van sterke prompts, oopmaak daarna die bijgepaste lewendig modus en pas wat aan die onderwerp aan.

entries.source: Core AI tutoring modes for explanations, Socratic questions, shared work, and adaptive lessons.
entries.value: Kernmodi vir AI-tutoring vir verduideliking, Sokratiese vrae, gedeeld werk en adaptieve lessen.

entries.source: Could you handle a starter prompt like "{value1}" with less help than before?
entries.value: Sou jy 'n startprompt soos "{value1}" met minder hulp dan eerder aankunnen?

entries.source: Could you turn the article into one concrete prompt or question?
entries.value: Sou jy die artikel kan omstapten in een konkrete prompt of vraag?

entries.source: Coverage ideas that link back to real public pages.
entries.value: Ideeën vir dekking wat terugskakel na regte openbare bladsye.

entries.source: Coverage of inspir's vision for free, accessible education.
entries.value: Berichtgeving oor die visie van inspir op gratis, toeganklik onderrig.

entries.source: Create a mind map for brainstorming, revision, planning, or connecting concepts before writing or studying.
entries.value: Skep 'n breinkaart vir dinkskrums, hersiening, beplanning of om konsepte te verbind voordat jy skryf of studeer.

entries.source: Create a realistic study plan around your time, energy, goals, weak spots, review loops, and practice schedule.
entries.value: Skep 'n realistiese studieplan rondom jou tyd, energie, doelwitte, swak punte, hersieningslusse en oefenskedule.

entries.source: Create a safer route for practice, explanations, feedback, and revision prompts without sending students into a generic chatbot.
entries.value: Maak 'n veiliger roete vir oefen, verduideliking, terugvoer en revisieprompts sonder studente na 'n generieke chatbot te sturen.

entries.source: Create a study plan around your time, energy, goals, and weak spots.
entries.value: Skep 'n studieplan rondom jou tyd, energie, doelwitte en swak punte.

entries.source: Create accountability check-ins with clear commitments, proof, recovery rules, and supportive follow-up.
entries.value: Skep verantwoordingsinligtingsessies met duidelike verbintenisse, bewys, herstelreëls en ondersteunende opvolg.

entries.source: Create an evidence-aware historical expedition anchored in a temporal passport, concrete place, date, identity, constraints, and progressive world state.
entries.value: Maak 'n historiese expeditie met aandacht vir bewyse, verankerd in 'n tijdelijk paspoort, konkrete plek, datum, identiteit, beperkings en voortschrijdende wereldstatus.

entries.source: Create APA, MLA, Chicago, Harvard, or simple bibliography entries from source details while checking for missing fields.
entries.value: Skep APA-, MLA-, Chicago-, Harvard- of eenvoudige bibliografie-inskrywings vanaf brondetail terwyl daar vir ontbrekende velde gekontroleer word.

entries.source: Create badges for consistency, mastery, courage, revision, collaboration, and finished artifacts.
entries.value: Skep kentekens vir konsekwentheid, bemeestering, moed, hersiening, samewerking en voltooide artefakte.

entries.source: Create challenge rules, rounds, feedback, unlocks, and recap.
entries.value: Maak uitdagingsregels, rondes, terugvoer, ontgrendelingen en 'n opsomming.

entries.source: Create concise learning reports that lead to better planning.
entries.value: Maak beknopte leerrapporten wat tot beter beplanning lei.

entries.source: Create diagram labeling practice from described visuals.
entries.value: Maak oefening in diagramlabeling op basis van beskryf visuals.

entries.source: Create exam-style practice tests that assess more than recall.
entries.value: Maak oefentoetse in eksamenstijl wat meer toetse dan net herinnering.

entries.source: Create fair leaderboards that reward effort, improvement, teamwork, or consistency without discouraging slower learners.
entries.value: Skep regverdige ranglyste wat moeite, verbetering, spanwerk of konsekwentheid beloon sonder om stadiger leerders te ontmoedig.

entries.source: Create fair, engaging 10-question multiple-choice quizzes on learner-chosen topics.
entries.value: Maak eerlike, boeiende meerkeusevasvrae van 10 vrae oor onderwerpe wat die leerder kies.

entries.source: Create matching practice that strengthens associations.
Create one quiz question or flashcard from the mistake.
entries.value: Maak een vasvravraag of flitskaart van die fout.

entries.source: Create practical exam preparation plans and review routines.
entries.value: Maak praktiese plannen vir eksamenvoorbereiding en herhalingsroetines.

entries.source: Create practical language roleplays with feedback.

entries.value: Maak oefening sonder antwoorde weg te gee

entries.source: Create short challenges and boss rounds
Create structured deep work sessions for difficult learning tasks.
entries.value: Maak gestruktureerdee deepwork-sessies vir moeilijke leertake.

entries.source: Create worksheets with question types such as fill-in-the-blank, MCQs, true/false, short answers, and matching.
entries.value: Skep werkblaaie met vraipes soos vul-in-die-leë-spasie, meervoudigekeusevrae, waar/onwaar, kort antwoorde en pasmaats.

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: brainstorm oor projeken, stories, ontwerpen, titels, eksperimente en onverwachte invalshoeken.

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer prompts and study loop
Curiosity, practice, and AI that teaches.
entries.value: Nieuwsgierigheid, oefening en AI wat onderwijst.

entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Nuuskierig oor absoluut enigiets? Vra, verken, en gaan dieper teen jou eie pas. Jou maat maak idees prakties, onvergeetlik, en maklik om op voort te bou. Probeer: "Verduidelik hoe die aandelemark werklik werk."

entries.source: Curious learners exploring context, arguments, people, texts, and ideas.
entries.value: Nieuwsgierige leerders wat konteks, argumente, mense, teksen en idees verkennen.

entries.source: Curious learners exploring history, humanities, argument, and big questions.
entries.value: Nieuwsgierige leerders wat geskiedenis, geesteswetenskappe, argumentatie en grote vrae verkennen.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel alive without confusing simulation for sources.
entries.value: Nieuwsgierige leerders wat wil dat geskiedenis en idees tot lewe kom sonder simulatie met bronne te verwarren.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel situated, debatable, and alive without losing track of evidence.
entries.value: Nuuskierige leerders wat wil hê geskiedenis en idees moet ingebed, debatteerbaar en lewendig voel sonder om die bewyse uit die oog te verloor.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Nuuskierige leerders, studente, ouers en selfonderrig-bouers wat 'n vriendelike plek soek om te begin.

entries.source: Custom AI learning spaces for every school community.
Custom AI learning spaces with data confidentiality.
Custom content, prompts, and workflows can be adapted around NCERT needs and school-specific classroom priorities.
entries.value: Aangepaste inhoud, prompts en werkvloeie kan word aangepast aan NCERT-behoeften en skoolspesifieke klasprioriteiten.

entries.source: Customer Safety & Privacy is our Priority
entries.value: Klantveiligheid en privaatheid is ons prioriteit
